name: @blockchainacademics/mcp
description: The canonical crypto MCP server for AI agents — 98 tools spanning news, entities, academy, market data, on-chain, sentiment, proprietary indicators, and agent-backed generation.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run version:check && npm test
scripts.version:check: node -e "const pkg=require("./package.json"); const v=require("./dist/version.js").VERSION; if(pkg.version!==v){console.error("VERSION mismatch: pkg="+pkg.version+" src="+v); process.exit(1)} else console.log("version ok: "+v)"

author: Blockchain Academics <hello@blockchainacademics.com>
